nm:output.nm:control_stream: $PROBLEM RcppNM bench adv2_trans2 ADVAN=2 TRANS=2 $SUBROUTINE ADVAN2 TRANS2 $INPUT ID TIME DV AMT MDV EVID CMT SS II $DATA data.csv IGNORE=@ $THETA (0.1, 1, 10) ; CL (1, 10, 100) ; V (0.1, 1, 10) ; KA (0.05, 0.5, 5) ; ALAG $OMEGA 0.09 0.09 $SIGMA 0.1 0.5 $PK CL = THETA(1) * exp(ETA(1)) V = THETA(2) KA = THETA(3) * exp(ETA(2)) ALAG1 = THETA(4) $ERROR Y = F * (1 + ERR(1)) + ERR(2) $EST METHOD=1 INTER MAXEVAL=9999 PRINT=1 NOABORT $COVAR PRINT=E
nm:output.nm:nmtran:
WARNINGS AND ERRORS (IF ANY) FOR PROBLEM 1
(WARNING 2) NM-TRAN INFERS THAT THE DATA ARE POPULATION.
(WARNING 23) $PK DOES NOT DEFINE A SCALE PARAMETER FOR THE CENTRAL COMPARTMENT. WITH THIS TRANS, IT MAY NOT BE POSSIBLE TO SEPARATELY OBTAIN ESTIMATES OF PARAMETERS AFFECTING CLEARANCE AND VOLUME.
